features.featureTitle: Redesign the entire frontend with a bright, energetic neon-accented color palette suited for Grade 1–8 students. Use vibrant colors such as electric cyan, neon yellow-green, hot pink, and vivid orange as accents on a clean white/light background. Use modern sans-serif typography (Poppins/Nunito). All icons must be modern (Lucide or similar). The design should be minimalistic yet energetic — clean layouts with bold neon highlights, not cluttered.

Build a Hero/Home section as the landing area for Akshar Learning Hub. Include the firm name 'Akshar Learning Hub', a compelling tagline, a brief intro about the tutoring services, and two CTA buttons: 'Book Free Demo' and 'Explore Programs'. Apply energetic neon-accented styling with animated elements.

Build an About section highlighting Akshar Learning Hub's positive learning environment. Emphasize: student discipline, attention to detail to avoid silly mistakes, life skills development, social growth, and increased student confidence. Include placeholder testimonial-style highlights from students and parents.

Build individual service sections for each of the following Akshar Learning Hub offerings, each with its own dedicated section/card layout, description, target grade range, and a modern icon: (1) After School Education Support (Tuitions) for Grade 1–8, (2) Phonics program, (3) Maths coaching, (4) Special Subject Mentoring, (5) Scholarship & Exam Preparation for Grade 5–10. Each service section must be visually distinct with neon-accented styling.

Build a Testimonials/Results section with placeholder student and parent success stories. Include at least 4–6 placeholder testimonial cards with names, roles (parent/student), grade level, and a short positive quote. Use a carousel or grid layout.

Build a Downloads section with three categories: (1) Free Downloads — openly accessible worksheets and materials with a direct download button; (2) Sign-up Required Downloads — gated by email + phone OTP verification before download is unlocked; (3) Paid Downloads — clicking redirects the user to a Payment page showing UPI/QR placeholder. Include placeholder cards for future uploads with clear labels indicating the material type (e.g., Phonics Workbook, Maths Worksheet, Past Exam Paper).

Implement a simulated OTP verification flow for sign-up gated downloads. When a user clicks a gated download, show a modal asking for their name, email address, and phone number. Validate email format and phone number format (10-digit Indian mobile). On submission, generate a 6-digit OTP, display it on-screen (simulated delivery — show OTP in the UI with a note that it would be sent via SMS in production), store the user's email and phone in the Motoko backend, and require the user to enter the OTP to proceed. On correct OTP entry, unlock the download.

Build a Payment page/section for paid worksheet purchases. This page should display a placeholder UPI QR code image (with a note to replace it), a placeholder UPI ID field (e.g., 'yourname@upi'), and instructions to complete payment and contact via WhatsApp to receive the material. Include a WhatsApp link for post-payment confirmation.

Build a Contact section with the following details: Phone number 7718823635 (clickable tel: link), a direct WhatsApp link pre-filled with an inquiry message to 7718823635, and the address: Opposite Pratibha College, Chinchwad, Pune 411019. Do NOT include an email address. The section should use modern card/icon layout with neon accents.
Build a fixed floating WhatsApp button visible on all pages/sections, linking to wa.me/917718823635 with a pre-filled inquiry message for Akshar Learning Hub.

Build a responsive fixed navigation header with the Akshar Learning Hub logo/name, nav links to all sections (Home, About, Services, Downloads, Contact), an 'Enroll Now' CTA button with neon accent styling, and a mobile hamburger menu.
Build a site Footer with Akshar Learning Hub branding, quick navigation links, a list of programs/services, and contact info (phone and address only, no email). Include the WhatsApp link.
